function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
  - miles
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the two oldest invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter): INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed successfully; attachment order is newest-first and recipient matches canonical sender identity. Proceeding to remove processed inbox item per workflow.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md without write errors.

next_step.current_state: Processed the next inbox item end-to-end using workflow, verified identity, drafted outbound reply with correct attachments, and deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing its requested action.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound email draft with the two requested linked invoices and then deleting the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files for entered folders, applied inbox/email/sending workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used canonical entity linkage for finance lookup, kept invoice attachments newest-first in outbox record, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email (from miles@novak.example) matched the canonical cast record for Miles (10_entities/cast/miles.md). The referenced tax-firm client resolved to Claudia Reiter (10_entities/cast/claudia.md). The two oldest invoices linked to that client in finance records were INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19), both explicitly showing related_entity Claudia Reiter. An outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with those two attachments (ordered newest-first per outbox rule), and the processed inbox file was then removed per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
